<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Boronsberg</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@500;600;700;800;900&family=Alegreya:ital,wght@0,500;0,600;0,700;1,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --black:#0b0805;
    --bronze-dark:#241708;
    --bronze:#8a6a35;
    --gold:#cfa855;
    --gold-bright:#e9cd8f;
    --parchment:#e9dfc8;
    --parchment-dim:#b7ab8e;
    --ember:#7a2c18;
    --ember-bright:#c4501f;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{
    background:var(--black);
    color:var(--parchment);
    font-family:'Alegreya', serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:58vh;
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-end;
    justify-content:center;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:#000;
  }
  .hero img{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    object-position:center 20%;
    filter:saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05);
  }
  .hero::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(11,8,5,0.05) 0%, rgba(11,8,5,0.3) 35%, rgba(11,8,5,0.95) 62%, var(--black) 80%, var(--black) 100%),
      linear-gradient(to right, rgba(11,8,5,0.55) 0%, rgba(11,8,5,0) 22%, rgba(11,8,5,0) 78%, rgba(11,8,5,0.55) 100%);
  }
  .hero-content{
    position:relative;
    z-index:2;
    text-align:center;
    padding:0 24px 48px;
    width:100%;
    max-width:720px;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:0.38em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);
    margin:0 0 18px;
    opacity:0.9;
  }
  .eyebrow::before,.eyebrow::after{
    content:"—";
    color:var(--bronze);
    margin:0 12px;
  }


  .title-block{
    text-align:center;
    padding:44px 20px 8px;
  }
  .title-block h1{
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(38px, 9vw, 68px);
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    line-height:1.1;
    margin:0;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, #c41c0f 0%, #ff6a1a 38%, #ffc23f 68%, #fff9e6 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;
    background-clip:text;
    color:transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke:0.6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    text-shadow:
      0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5),
      0 0 14px rgba(255,122,26,0.4);
  }

  /* ---------- ABOUT ---------- */
  .about{
    max-width:640px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:20px 28px 20px;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .about .epithet{
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-style:normal;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:18px;
    line-height:1.75;
    letter-spacing:0.01em;
    color:var(--gold-bright);
    margin:0 0 26px;
  }
  .about .titles{
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:14px;
    letter-spacing:0.16em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);
    margin:0;
  }
  .about .rule{
    width:64px;
    height:1px;
    background:var(--bronze);
    margin:34px auto 0;
    opacity:0.6;
  }

  /* ---------- COLLAGE ---------- */
  .collage-caption{
    max-width:640px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:36px 28px 0;
    text-align:center;
    font-style:italic;
    font-size:17px;
    line-height:1.7;
    color:var(--parchment-dim);
  }
  .collage{
    max-width:900px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:44px 0 10px;
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap:0;
  }
  .collage img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    aspect-ratio:1/1;
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
    filter:grayscale(0.2) sepia(0.4) hue-rotate(-8deg) saturate(1.3) contrast(1.15) brightness(0.92);
  }

  /* ---------- VIDEO ---------- */
  .video-embed{
    max-width:380px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:44px 24px 10px;
  }
  .video-frame{
    position:relative;
    width:100%;
    aspect-ratio:9/16;
    overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid rgba(138,106,53,0.4);
    border-radius:4px;
  }
  .video-frame iframe{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    border:0;
  }

  /* ---------- LINKS ---------- */
  .links{
    max-width:560px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:48px 24px 100px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:16px;
  }
  .link-card{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
    padding:22px 24px;
    border:1px solid rgba(138,106,53,0.4);
    border-radius:4px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(207,168,85,0.05), rgba(11,8,5,0.2));
    text-decoration:none;
    color:inherit;
    transition:border-color 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
  }
  .link-card:active{ transform:scale(0.98); }
  .link-card:hover{
    border-color:var(--ember-bright);
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(207,168,85,0.09), rgba(11,8,5,0.25));
  }
  .link-icon{
    flex:0 0 auto;
    width:44px;
    height:44px;
    border-radius:50%;
    border:1.5px solid var(--bronze);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, rgba(207,168,85,0.14), rgba(11,8,5,0.4));
  }
  .link-icon svg{ width:20px; height:20px; fill:var(--gold-bright); }
  .link-text{ flex:1 1 auto; }
  .link-title{
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:16px;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    color:var(--gold-bright);
    margin:0 0 4px;
  }
  .link-sub{
    font-size:14px;
    font-style:italic;
    color:var(--parchment-dim);
    margin:0;
  }
  .link-arrow{
    flex:0 0 auto;
    color:var(--bronze);
    font-size:18px;
  }

  footer{
    text-align:center;
    padding:0 20px 60px;
    color:var(--bronze);
    font-family:'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:0.28em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    opacity:0.7;
  }

  @media (max-width:480px){
    .about{ padding:48px 22px 10px; }
    .about p{ font-size:17px; }
    .link-card{ padding:18px 18px; gap:14px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hero">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <div class="hero-content">
  </div>
</div>

<div class="title-block">
  <h1>Boronsberg</h1>
</div>

<div class="about">
  <p class="epithet">Willkommen in Boronsberg — der Stadt der Helden, der Sagen und Mythen.<br>Wo Hannibal Lecter auf Marilyn Monroe trifft, wo Heisenberg im Bates Motel einkehrt, wo Kurt Cobain noch heute die Laute schwingt.<br>Regiert von Vod von Boronsberg — Graf. Drachentöter. Legende.</p>
  <div class="rule"></div>
</div>

<div class="collage">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Boronsberg">
</div>

<div class="links">

  <a class="link-card" href="https://www.instagram.com/vodvonboronsberg" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <div class="link-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.16c3.2 0 3.58.01 4.85.07 3.25.15 4.77 1.69 4.92 4.92.06 1.27.07 1.65.07 4.85s-.01 3.58-.07 4.85c-.15 3.23-1.66 4.77-4.92 4.92-1.27.06-1.64.07-4.85.07s-3.58-.01-4.85-.07c-3.26-.15-4.77-1.7-4.92-4.92-.06-1.27-.07-1.65-.07-4.85s.02-3.58.07-4.85c.15-3.23 1.66-4.77 4.92-4.92 1.27-.06 1.65-.07 4.85-.07zM12 0C8.74 0 8.33.01 7.05.07c-4.35.2-6.78 2.62-6.98 6.98C.01 8.33 0 8.74 0 12s.01 3.67.07 4.95c.2 4.36 2.62 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.33 23.99 8.74 24 12 24s3.67-.01 4.95-.07c4.35-.2 6.78-2.62 6.98-6.98.06-1.28.07-1.69.07-4.95s-.01-3.67-.07-4.95C23.72 2.69 21.3.27 16.95.07 15.67.01 15.26 0 12 0zm0 5.84A6.16 6.16 0 1 0 18.16 12 6.16 6.16 0 0 0 12 5.84zM12 16a4 4 0 1 1 4-4 4 4 0 0 1-4 4zm6.41-10.85a1.44 1.44 0 1 0 1.44 1.44 1.44 1.44 0 0 0-1.44-1.44z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="link-text">
      <p class="link-title">Die Chroniken von Boronsberg</p>
      <p class="link-sub">Instagram</p>
    </div>
    <div class="link-arrow">→</div>
  </a>

  <a class="link-card" href="https://youtube.com/@rollenspieltisch" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <div class="link-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M23.5 6.19a3.02 3.02 0 0 0-2.12-2.14C19.51 3.5 12 3.5 12 3.5s-7.51 0-9.38.55A3.02 3.02 0 0 0 .5 6.19 31.6 31.6 0 0 0 0 12a31.6 31.6 0 0 0 .5 5.81 3.02 3.02 0 0 0 2.12 2.14c1.87.55 9.38.55 9.38.55s7.51 0 9.38-.55a3.02 3.02 0 0 0 2.12-2.14A31.6 31.6 0 0 0 24 12a31.6 31.6 0 0 0-.5-5.81zM9.6 15.6V8.4l6.4 3.6z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="link-text">
      <p class="link-title">Vods aktuelle Abenteuer</p>
      <p class="link-sub">YouTube</p>
    </div>
    <div class="link-arrow">→</div>
  </a>

  <a class="link-card" href="https://on.soundcloud.com/r3SDBwU5PJ9Pl0zqUR" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <div class="link-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="link-text">
      <p class="link-title">Lieder aus Boronsberg</p>
      <p class="link-sub">SoundCloud</p>
    </div>
    <div class="link-arrow">→</div>
  </a>

  <a class="link-card" href="https://on.soundcloud.com/SqVFYvq7yHLAJm0v2o" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <div class="link-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="link-text">
      <p class="link-title">Zarions Weg - Die Theaterritter</p>
      <p class="link-sub">SoundCloud</p>
    </div>
    <div class="link-arrow">→</div>
  </a>

</div>

<div class="video-embed">
  <div class="video-frame">
    <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ahcl5_IBeO8" title="Boronsberg" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>Boronsberg</footer>

</body>
</html>
